queries.name: Verification Friction Analysis
queries.final_error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 2 problems\nline 3:102: Unknown column [agent_team]\nline 3:74: Unknown column [verification_step_count]')

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'action_request_validation_exception', 'Validation Failed: 1: [query] is required;')
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 1 problem\nline 3:44: Unknown column [verification_steps]')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 30 days
| EVAL verification_steps_count = COALESCE(verification_steps, 0)
| INLINESTATS avg_duration = AVG(call_duration_seconds) BY agent_team
| EVAL duration_vs_avg = call_duration_seconds - avg_duration
| EVAL is_outlier = CASE(
    ABS(duration_vs_avg) > (avg_duration * 0.3), "Yes",
    "No"
  )
| STATS 
    avg_call_duration = AVG(call_duration_seconds),
    avg_verification_steps = AVG(verification_steps_count),
    outlier_count = COUNT_IF(is_outlier == "Yes"),
    total_calls = COUNT(*)
  BY agent_team
| EVAL outlier_percentage = ROUND((outlier_count / total_calls) * 100, 2)
| SORT outlier_percentage DESC

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 2 problems\nline 3:102: Unknown column [agent_team]\nline 3:74: Unknown column [verification_step_count]')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| WHERE @timestamp >= NOW() - 30 days
| INLINESTATS avg_duration = AVG(call_duration_seconds), avg_steps = AVG(verification_step_count) BY agent_team
| EVAL duration_vs_avg = call_duration_seconds - avg_duration
| EVAL steps_vs_avg = verification_step_count - avg_steps
| WHERE duration_vs_avg > 0 AND steps_vs_avg > 0
| STATS 
    outlier_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_excess_duration = AVG(duration_vs_avg),
    avg_excess_steps = AVG(steps_vs_avg),
    correlation = AVG(duration_vs_avg * steps_vs_avg)
  BY agent_team
| SORT correlation DESC

queries.name: Prior Authorization Bottleneck Detection
queries.final_error:
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 3 problems

line 5:15: Unknown index [provider_network_lookup]
line 15:15: Unknown index [call_center_transactions_lookup]')

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'action_request_validation_exception', 'Validation Failed: 1: [query] is required;')
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [provider_network] resolves to [.ds-provider_network-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM prior_authorizations
| WHERE status == "pending" AND DATE_DIFF("day", submission_date, NOW()) > 3 AND urgency == "urgent"
| LOOKUP JOIN provider_network ON provider_id
| EVAL days_pending = DATE_DIFF("day", submission_date, NOW())
| STATS 
    pending_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_days_pending = AVG(days_pending),
    max_days_pending = MAX(days_pending)
  BY provider_network.provider_name, provider_network.specialty
| LOOKUP JOIN call_center_transactions ON provider_id
| EVAL call_volume = COUNT(call_center_transactions.call_id)
| WHERE pending_count > 5
| SORT pending_count DESC
| LIMIT 50

fix_history.error:
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 3 problems
line 2:33: Unknown column [urgency]
line 5:15: Unknown index [provider_network_lookup]
line 15:15: Unknown index [call_center_transactions_lookup]')
fix_history.esql:
FROM prior_authorizations
| WHERE status == "pending" AND urgency == "urgent"
| EVAL days_pending = (NOW() - submission_date) / 86400000
| WHERE days_pending > 3
| LOOKUP JOIN provider_network_lookup ON provider_id
| EVAL hour_bucket = DATE_TRUNC(1 hour, submission_date)
| INLINESTATS avg_pending = AVG(days_pending), std_pending = STDDEV(days_pending) BY provider_network_lookup.specialty
| EVAL z_score = (days_pending - avg_pending) / std_pending
| WHERE z_score > 2
| STATS 
    pending_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_days_pending = AVG(days_pending),
    max_days_pending = MAX(days_pending)
  BY provider_network_lookup.provider_name, provider_network_lookup.specialty
| LOOKUP JOIN call_center_transactions_lookup ON provider_id
| EVAL related_calls = COALESCE(call_center_transactions_lookup.call_count, 0)
| SORT pending_count DESC
| LIMIT 50

queries.name: Cost Efficiency Anomaly Detection
queries.final_error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'action_request_validation_exception', 'Validation Failed: 1: [query] is required;')
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| EVAL cost_per_transaction = transaction_cost / GREATEST(transaction_count, 1)
| LOOKUP JOIN agents ON agent_id
| LOOKUP JOIN member_plans ON plan_id
| INLINESTATS avg_cost = AVG(cost_per_transaction) BY call_type
| EVAL cost_deviation = cost_per_transaction - avg_cost
| EVAL is_anomaly = CASE(cost_deviation > avg_cost * 0.5, "High Cost Anomaly", "Normal")
| EVAL processing_hour = DATE_TRUNC(1 hour, @timestamp)
| STATS 
    total_transactions = COUNT(*),
    avg_cost_per_transaction = AVG(cost_per_transaction),
    avg_processing_time = AVG(processing_time_seconds),
    anomaly_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(CASE(is_anomaly == "High Cost Anomaly", transaction_id, null))
  BY call_type, agents.team, member_plans.plan_complexity, processing_hour
| EVAL efficiency_rate = total_transactions / GREATEST(avg_processing_time, 1)
| WHERE anomaly_count > 0 OR avg_cost_per_transaction > 50
| SORT avg_cost_per_transaction DESC
| LIMIT 100

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| EVAL cost_per_transaction = transaction_cost / transaction_count
| LOOKUP JOIN agents ON agent_id
| LOOKUP JOIN member_plans ON plan_id
| STATS 
    avg_cost = AVG(cost_per_transaction),
    avg_processing_time = AVG(processing_time_minutes),
    total_transactions = SUM(transaction_count)
  BY call_type, agents.team, member_plans.plan_complexity
| EVAL efficiency_rate = total_transactions / avg_processing_time
| INLINESTATS 
    overall_avg_cost = AVG(avg_cost),
    cost_stddev = STDDEV(avg_cost)
| EVAL 
    cost_deviation = (avg_cost - overall_avg_cost) / cost_stddev,
    is_anomaly = CASE(cost_deviation > 2, "High Cost Anomaly", cost_deviation < -2, "Low Cost Anomaly", "Normal")
| WHERE is_anomaly != "Normal" OR cost_deviation > 1.5
| SORT cost_deviation DESC
| LIMIT 100

queries.name: Provider Network Currency Analysis

BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [provider_network] resolves to [.ds-provider_network-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| LOOKUP JOIN provider_network ON provider_id
| WHERE call_reason LIKE "*network*" OR call_reason LIKE "*provider*"
| EVAL days_since_verification = (NOW() - provider_network.last_verification_date) / 86400000
| WHERE days_since_verification > 90
| STATS 
    call_volume = COUNT(*),
    avg_days_stale = AVG(days_since_verification),
    unique_members = COUNT_DISTINCT(member_id)
  BY provider_network.provider_name, provider_network.network_status
| WHERE call_volume > 10
| SORT call_volume DESC
| LIMIT 50

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 2 problems\nline 3:46: Unknown column [provider_id]\nline 4:15: Unknown index [provider_network_lookup]')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| EVAL call_date = DATE_TRUNC(1 day, @timestamp)
| STATS call_volume = COUNT(*) BY call_date, provider_id
| LOOKUP JOIN provider_network_lookup ON provider_id
| WHERE provider_network_lookup.last_verification_date < NOW() - 90 days
| EVAL days_since_verification = DATE_DIFF("day", provider_network_lookup.last_verification_date, NOW())
| STATS 
    total_calls = SUM(call_volume),
    avg_days_stale = AVG(days_since_verification),
    provider_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(provider_id)
  BY call_date
| SORT call_date DESC
| LIMIT 100

queries.name: Denial Code Resolution Effectiveness
queries.final_error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'action_request_validation_exception', 'Validation Failed: 1: [query] is required;')
BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| WHERE issue_category == "medical_coding_complexity"
| LOOKUP JOIN claims_denials_lookup ON denial_code
| LOOKUP JOIN agents ON agent_id
| EVAL resolution_time_hours = (resolution_timestamp - call_timestamp) / 3600000
| STATS 
    total_cases = COUNT(*),
    avg_resolution_hours = AVG(resolution_time_hours),
    resolution_rate = COUNT_IF(status == "resolved") * 100.0 / COUNT(*),
    avg_calls_to_resolve = AVG(call_count)
  BY denial_code, claims_denials_lookup.denial_description, agents.agent_name, agents.experience_level
| EVAL effectiveness_score = (resolution_rate * 0.6) + ((1 / avg_resolution_hours) * 100 * 0.4)
| WHERE total_cases >= 5
| SORT effectiveness_score DESC
| LIMIT 50

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [agents] resolves to [.ds-agents-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| WHERE issue_category == "medical_coding_complexity"
| LOOKUP JOIN claims_denials_lookup ON denial_code
| LOOKUP JOIN agents ON agent_id
| EVAL resolution_time_hours = (resolved_timestamp - created_timestamp) / 3600000
| WHERE resolution_time_hours IS NOT NULL
| STATS 
    total_cases = COUNT(*),
    avg_resolution_hours = AVG(resolution_time_hours),
    successful_resolutions = COUNT_IF(resolution_status == "resolved"),
    avg_customer_satisfaction = AVG(customer_satisfaction_score)
  BY agent_id, agents.agent_name, denial_code, claims_denials_lookup.denial_description
| EVAL success_rate = successful_resolutions / total_cases * 100
| SORT avg_resolution_hours ASC
| LIMIT 100

queries.name: Find Members by Plan and Coverage Status
queries.final_error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [member_plans] resolves to [.ds-member_plans-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'action_request_validation_exception', 'Validation Failed: 1: [query] is required;')

BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [call_center_transactions] resolves to [.ds-call_center_transactions-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM member_plans
| LOOKUP JOIN call_center_transactions ON member_id
| STATS 
    recent_calls = COUNT(call_center_transactions.call_id),
    avg_call_duration = AVG(call_center_transactions.call_duration)
  BY member_id, plan_type, coverage_status
| INLINESTATS 
    plan_avg_calls = AVG(recent_calls),
    plan_avg_duration = AVG(avg_call_duration)
  BY plan_type
| EVAL 
    calls_vs_avg = recent_calls - plan_avg_calls,
    duration_vs_avg = avg_call_duration - plan_avg_duration
| SORT recent_calls DESC
| LIMIT 100

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [member_plans] resolves to [.ds-member_plans-2025.11.01-000001] in [standard] mode')
fix_history.esql:
FROM call_center_transactions
| STATS 
    call_count = COUNT(*),
    recent_calls = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY member_id
| LOOKUP JOIN member_plans ON member_id
| WHERE member_plans.plan_type IS NOT NULL
| EVAL days_since_last_call = (NOW() - recent_calls) / 86400000
| INLINESTATS 
    avg_calls_by_plan = AVG(call_count) BY member_plans.plan_type
| EVAL calls_vs_avg = call_count - avg_calls_by_plan
| SORT recent_calls DESC
| KEEP member_id, member_plans.plan_type, member_plans.coverage_status, call_count, avg_calls_by_plan, calls_vs_avg, recent_calls, days_since_last_call
| LIMIT 100

fix_history.esql:
FROM provider_network
| LOOKUP JOIN prior_authorizations ON provider_id
| EVAL days_since_update = (NOW() - last_verified_date) / 86400000
| EVAL is_outdated = CASE(days_since_update > 180, "Yes", "No")
| STATS 
    pending_auth_count = COUNT(CASE(prior_authorizations.status == "pending", 1, null)),
    total_providers = COUNT(*)
  BY specialty, network_status, is_outdated
| SORT pending_auth_count DESC
| LIMIT 100

fix_history.error: BadRequestError(400, 'verification_exception', 'Found 1 problem\nline 2:29: [-] has arguments with incompatible types [datetime] and [datetime]')
fix_history.esql:
FROM provider_network
| EVAL days_since_update = (NOW() - last_verified_date) / 86400000
| EVAL potentially_outdated = CASE(days_since_update > 180, "Yes", "No")
| STATS 
    provider_count = COUNT(*),
    avg_days_since_update = AVG(days_since_update),
    outdated_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(CASE(potentially_outdated == "Yes", provider_id, null))
  BY specialty, network_status
| SORT provider_count DESC
| LIMIT 100
